headline: Moburst Taps Seasoned Tech Strategist Salam Beasan as Vice President of AI and Innovation
summary: With more than 15 years in data and product strategy, Beasan will lead the global agency's next phase of AI-driven client growthNEW YORK, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Moburst, a leading full-service mobile-first digital marketing agency, has named Salam Beasan vice president of AI and innovation.
